versions.version_description: A lot of versions of this song already, and I didn't want to clutter the database with another version, but I think this version was worth making because it's quite accurate to the recording. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HaMq2nn5ac0.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse]

[tab][ch]E[/ch] 
Yes I do, I believe[/tab]
 
That one day I will be, where I was
[tab]                            [ch]Aadd9[/ch]
Right there, right next to you[/tab]
 
And it's hard, the days just seem so dark

The moon, the stars, are nothing without you
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]
Your touch, your skin, where do I begin?[/tab]
[tab]                                           [ch]Aadd9[/ch]
No words can explain, the way I'm missing you[/tab]

Deny this emptiness, this hole that I'm inside

These tears, they tell their own story


[Chorus]

[tab]    [ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]C#m[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]
You told me not to cry when you were gone[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]A/B[/ch]
But the feelings overwhelming, it's much too strong[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]C#m[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Can I lay by your side, next to you, you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]C#m[/ch]
And make sure you're alright[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]
I'll take care of you [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]                       [ch]A/B[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch] 
And I don't want to be here if I can't be with you tonight[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]
I'm reaching out to you[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]A[/ch]
Can you hear my call?[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]
This hurt that I've been through[/tab]
[tab]                                    [ch]A[/ch]
I'm missing you, missing you like crazy[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]    [ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]C#m[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]
You told me not to cry when you were gone[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F#m[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]E/B[/ch]    [ch]A/B[/ch]
But the feelings overwhelming, it's much too strong[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]B/D#[/ch] [ch]C#m[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Can I lay by your side, next to you, you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]C#m[/ch]
And make sure you're alright[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]
I'll take care of you[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]                       [ch]A/B[/ch]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]
And I don't want to be here if I can't be with you tonight[/tab]


[Instrumental]

[ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]B7sus2[/ch]


[Outro]

[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]B7sus2[/ch]
Lay me down tonight[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]B7sus2[/ch]
lay me by your side[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]B7sus2[/ch]
Lay me down tonight[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]B7sus2[/ch]
lay me by your side[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]F#m[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]A/B[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
Can I lay by your side, next to you, you[/tab]
